body:
Reallocation of a payment made in error

(Payment to be reallocated to where it was originally intended.)

For steps on how to make corrections please follow - Self-Assessment reallocate / wrongly allocated payments - Step 1 

Effective date of payment (EDP

  • The original date of the payment

Repayment supplement (RPS)

Note: Repayment supplement is not applicable in these cases.
title: Repayments: issue repayment: reallocation of a payment allocated in error
